zh.lifeSummary: 當Cadell ap Einion於0953年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特時，他的父親King Einion ab Owain18歲，母親Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan19歲。他和Elinor ferch Gwerystan至少有3個兒子。他於983年登記服兵役。他去世於1018年在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾利朗連享年65歲，埋葬在威爾士卡馬特史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cadell ap Einion于0953年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特时，他的父亲King Einion ab Owain18岁，母亲Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan19岁。他和Elinor ferch Gwerystan至少有3个儿子。他于983年登记服兵役。他去世于1018年在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾利朗連享年65岁，埋葬在威尔士卡馬特史爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pinning (see Penning ) with -ion substituted for -in(g), perhaps through false association with the word pinion ‘wing, feather’. Compare Pinyan .

variants.name: Penning
meanings: English, Dutch, and North German: from early Middle English penning, Low German penning, Middle Dutch penninc ‘penny’ (see Penny ), a topographic name (from a field name) or a nickname referring to tax dues of a penny.
South German: from the short form, Panno, of an ancient Germanic personal name derived from a word meaning ‘ban, order, command’.
English: from a Middle English personal name Pening, Pining, presumably representing an unrecorded Old English name, a pet form perhaps of Penda or of names like Pendhere and Pendwulf.

nameMeanings.name: Cadell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Cadell ap Einion was born in 0953, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, King Einion ab Owain, was 18 and his mother, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, was 19. He had at least 3 sons with Elinor ferch Gwerystan. He registered for military service in 983. He died in 1018, in Llangwm, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Carmarthenshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cadell ap Einion est né en 0953, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, King Einion ab Owain, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Elinor ferch Gwerystan. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 983. Il est décédé en 1018, à Llangwm, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Carmarthenshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cadell ap Einion 0953 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Einion ab Owain 18 und seine Mutter Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan 19. Er hatte mit Elinor ferch Gwerystan mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 983 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1018 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Llangwm, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Carmarthenshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cadell ap Einion è nato il nel 0953 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, King Einion ab Owain, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Elinor ferch Gwerystan. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 983. Morì nel 1018, nel Llangwm, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Carmarthenshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Cadell ap Einionが0953年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで生まれた時，父King Einion ab Owainは18歳，母Queen Nest ferch Gwerystanは19歳であった。彼はElinor ferch Gwerystanとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は983年に兵役登録をした。彼は1018年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラングウムで65歳で死去し，ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cadell ap Einion(이)가 0953년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Einion ab Owain(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Elinor ferch Gwerystan(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 983년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1018년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랭w에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카마테실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cadell ap Einion nasceu em 0953, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, King Einion ab Owain, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Elinor ferch Gwerystan. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 983. Ele faleceu em 1018, em Llangwm, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Carmarthenshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cadell ap Einion родился в 0953 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени King Einion ab Owain было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Elinor ferch Gwerystan. В 983 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1018 г. в местности ллангвм, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cadell ap Einion nació en 0953, en Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, King Einion ab Owain, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Elinor ferch Gwerystan. Se enlistó en el ejército en 983. Murió en 1018, en Llangwm, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Carmarthenshire, Gales.
